title: Death and Rebirth Alternate Universe
wikitext:
[]: Death and Rebirth: Alternate Universe?             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Wed Jan 10, 2007 9:05 pm You know how in this movie we see Shinji, Asuka, Rei, and Toji (not sure) playing in a school auditorium. The title thing says "18 months ago" which doesn't make sense. So what I'm wondering is, is this a typo or is this gathering just a little unifying theme which never really happens in the timeline?

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Wed Jan 10, 2007 11:45 pm It was Shinji, Asuka, Rei and Kaworu. So it's not part of the TV shows canon. The whole series doesn't take that long. Probably about nine months It began in 2015 and ep 25 happened sometime in 2016. I think the series started in summer, but I'm not sure why I think that. I guess it's AU but I'd have to search, not a lot of discussion happens regarding Death and Rebirth.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Jan 11, 2007 12:25 am Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: It was Shinji, Asuka, Rei and Kaworu. So it's not part of the TV shows canon. The whole series doesn't take that long. Probably about nine months It began in 2015 and ep 25 happened sometime in 2016. I think the series started in summer, but I'm not sure why I think that. I guess it's AU but I'd have to search, not a lot of discussion happens regarding Death and Rebirth.

[]:             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Thu Jan 11, 2007 1:49 am Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: I think the series started in summer, but I'm not sure why I think that.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Thu Jan 11, 2007 9:37 am Non-canon. Metaphysical. Scene transition. Etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Thu Jan 11, 2007 4:09 pm Tokpile Quohog wrote: But something else that's bothering me is, if this quartet practice was largely unrelated to the series in terms of being an actual event, why bother telling us that the auditorium practice happened 18 months ago?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Fri Jan 12, 2007 5:11 pm look closer, Tokyo 2 auditorium. It's not AU. If I remember correctly, (and I can not remember where I got this) it's not actually Shinji, Asuka, Rei, and Kaworu, just people who look amazingly like them...

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Fri Jan 12, 2007 8:20 pm To save everyone time here you go: NB Iâ€™ve left out most of the dialogue and such and just left in the subtitles in question and some supporting information(what happened directly before.) Forgive what may appear to be inappropriate levity, It was quiet annoying typing it out. Notes in brackets, all kinds. +++ = omited scene. Antartica 2000 AD +++ Misato put in pod +++ 15 years later she was held by a man.[ep20] +++ 9 months earlier he was watching the stars.[opening 21â€™{pre ep 8}] +++ Seven years earlier she ran into a room [Asuka sees dead Kyoko(since when did this happen in 2008!)] +++ [Intro Rei ep 21 pre â€˜old hagâ€™] +++ Five years later she met him again [sees Shinji{Rei met Shinji then? Last update was 2007}] Ep 1 Quantum Rei scene +++ Sevral months later he was forced to make a decision [Re Kaworu] +++ 18 Months Earlier Nagano District Neo-Tokyo 2 In the Auditorium of High School 3 (henchforth AHS3)[same school different place] 22 minuits prior to String Quartet Rehearsal (SQR) Cello fourth string Tuning Johann Sebastian BACH Suiten fÃ¼r Violoncello Solo Nr 1 G-dur, BWV, 1007 1 Vospier +++ Asuka: Good morning Ikari-kun Shinji: Good morning AHS3 10 min 30 sec prior to SQR Asuka: What are we playing Shinji: Pachelblel Kanon Asuka: Celloâ€™s so easy all you have to do is play arpeggio [zzing] Violin second string Tuning JS BACH Partita III fÃ¼r Violino solo 3 Gavotte in Ronodo +++ Shinji: Good morning AHS3 Viola third string 5 min 42 sec prior to SQR Tuning +++ 12 years earlier [Kozo and Yuiâ€™s conversation by the lake{2003}] +++(omited scene is in present) 5 years earlier [Exit Naoko stage down] +++ Asuka: Youâ€™re late Kaworu: Sorry Sorry SQR start Appointed time Violin first string[Angel] Kaworu: Shall we begin? SQ Piece PACHELBLEL KANON D-dur The dates are all screwy (Asuka is in Japan 9 months before ep 8 for one thing and thatâ€™s not the worst Nagisa-san ), and the place has been changed. Personally Iâ€™m leaning towards AU. Kaworu was only there for one day for Yuiâ€™s sake! I found myself thinking instrument-ality (run from the pun!). That was only re-enforced by the SQR start Appointed time

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jan 12, 2007 8:45 pm Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: I found myself thinking instrument-ality (run from the pun!). That was only re-enforced by the SQR start Appointed time

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Fri Jan 12, 2007 8:53 pm Also, at the very end of Death, after the credits, Shinji is shown leaving the practice room.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jan 16, 2007 4:44 pm Didn't I make a topic for this question before? I thought we all figured out that it was simply AU as Asuka (was she in Germany or America??) and Shinji (wherever the hell his sensei's place is) are there FAR earlier than they should be, and Kaworu only showed up AFTER Asuka was found/taken to NERV's hospiteal. Also, the fact that Asuka refers to Shinji as "Ikari-kun" should be a clue. ;) (Though what's the deal with Asuka laughing when Rei shows up?? Yeah, Asuka obviously doesn't like Rei, but that scene lost me. )

[]:             Quote Post by Tybalt » Wed Jan 17, 2007 7:46 pm Hi, new person here. Episode 1 was aired on October 4, 1995 (according to the first Platinum booklet). Death and Rebirth premiered on March 15, 1997 (according to Wikipedia ). That's a difference of about 17.5 months. Doesn't "18 months ago" refer to this? Not to anything within the series, but to when the show began for the audience.

The title thing says "18 months ago" which doesn't make sense. So what I'm wondering is, is this a typo or is this gathering just a little unifying theme which never really happens in the timeline?
